Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.utils.impl

Interface DatabaseEntryUtils

All Superinterfaces:
DatabaseEntryUtilsOptionsOwner
All Known Subinterfaces:
ProxyDatabaseEntryUtils
All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseDatabaseEntryUtils, BaseProxyDatabaseEntryUtils, MySQLDatabaseEntryUtils, PostgreSQLDatabaseEntryUtils, SQLiteDatabaseEntryUtils
public interface DatabaseEntryUtils extends DatabaseEntryUtilsOptionsOwner
